2606.18051.title: Compositional Skill Routing for LLM Agents: Decompose, Retrieve, and Compose
2606.18051.paper_summary: LLM agents increasingly rely on external skills -- reusable tool specifications -- but real-world tasks often require composing multiple skills, not just selecting one. We formalize this as the Compositional Skill Routing problem: given a complex user query and a large skill library, decompose the query into atomic sub-tasks, retrieve the appropriate skill for each sub-task, and compose an executable plan. We present SkillWeaver, a decompose-retrieve-compose framework combining an LLM task decomposer, a bi-encoder skill retriever with FAISS indexing, and a dependency-aware DAG planner. To support evaluation, we introduce CompSkillBench, a benchmark of 300 compositional queries over 2,209 real MCP server skills spanning 24 functional categories, sourced from the public MCP ecosystem. Our experiments reveal that task decomposition quality is the primary bottleneck: standard LLM decomposition reaches only 34.2% category recall at the step level. To address this, we propose Iterative Skill-Aware Decomposition (SAD), a retrieval-augmented feedback loop that iteratively aligns decomposition with available skills. SAD improves decomposition accuracy from 51.0% to 67.7% (+32.7%, Wilcoxon p < 10^-6) in a single iteration; DA-conditioned analysis confirms that correct granularity is the prerequisite for effective retrieval (CatR@1 rises from 34% to 41% when DA=1). SkillWeaver reduces context window consumption by over 99%, and transfer experiments confirm generalization (+35.6% relative DA gain even when target categories are absent from the retrieval pool).
2606.18051.paper_summary_zh: LLM 代理越來越依賴外部技能——可重用的工具規範——但現實世界的任務通常需要組合多個技能，而不僅僅是選擇一個。我們將此正式化為組合技能路由問題：給定一個複雜的用戶查詢和一個大型技能庫，將查詢分解為原子子任務，為每個子任務檢索適當的技能，並組合成可執行的計劃。我們提出了 SkillWeaver，一個分解-檢索-組合框架，結合了一個 LLM 任務分解器、一個帶有 FAISS 索引的雙編碼器技能檢索器和一個考慮依賴關係的 DAG 計劃器。為了支持評估，我們介紹了 CompSkillBench，一個基於 2,209 個真實 MCP 伺服器技能的 300 個組合查詢的基準，這些技能涵蓋了 24 個功能類別，來自公共 MCP 生態系統。我們的實驗顯示，任務分解質量是主要瓶頸：標準 LLM 分解在步驟層級的類別召回率僅達到 34.2%。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了迭代技能感知分解（SAD），這是一個檢索增強的反饋循環，逐步將分解與可用技能對齊。SAD 在單次迭代中將分解準確率從 51.0% 提高到 67.7%（+32.7%，Wilcoxon p < 10^-6）；DA 條件分析確認正確的粒度是有效檢索的前提（當 DA=1 時，CatR@1 從 34% 上升到 41%）。SkillWeaver 將上下文窗口消耗減少了超過 99%，而轉移實驗確認了泛化能力（即使目標類別不在檢索池中，仍然獲得 +35.6% 的相對 DA 增益）。
2606.18051.author: Xueping Gao et.al.
